description:
Batch 1/5 — Core Pool Infrastructure (1 of 3)

Extract the agent lifecycle from execute_running_workflow_phases_for_project into a self-contained AgentSlot struct. Currently the function builds a ScheduledPhaseRun, spawns into JoinSet, and processes results all inline. Refactor into:

- AgentSlot { workflow, task, phase_id, phase_attempt, execution_cwd } with a run() method that calls run_workflow_phase_with_agent and returns the result
- AgentSlotResult that wraps the outcome (Completed/NeedsResearch/Error) with workflow+task context
- process_agent_result() extracted function that handles the match on PhaseExecutionOutcome (advance, rework, fail, needs-research) — currently lines 1254-1380 of daemon_scheduler_project_tick.rs

This is a pure refactor — no behavior change. The existing execute_running_workflow_phases_for_project should use the new abstractions internally. File: daemon_scheduler_project_tick.rs, potentially a new daemon_agent_pool.rs module.
title: Extract agent phase execution into standalone AgentSlot abstraction
